generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired FBI agent, I've seen firsthand how vital it is to strengthen our domestic security powers. The threats we face today are more complex than ever, and our agencies need the tools to stay ahead. While some worry about civil liberties, we must remember that balanced measures are already in place. Trust the experts who work daily to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
